creator: ae@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

fdisk(8) is legacy tool and users of FreeBSD 8+ should use gpart(8) instead. 
The proposed suggestion already removed from boot0cfg(8) manual page, so 
it will not appears again. 

http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=162801 

Date: Thu, 24 Nov 2011 01:18:10 +0100
